heading: Definitions
label: 53901 Definitions

children.label: A
children.text: a documented vessel with a registry or coastwise endorsement under chapter 121 of this title;

children.label: B
children.text: an undocumented vessel owned or chartered by or made available to the United States Government; and

children.label: C
children.text: a tug, barge, or other watercraft (whether or not documented) owned by a citizen of the United States and used in essential water transportation or in the fisheries, except only for sport fishing.

children.heading: .—Cargo
children.label: 2 .—Cargo
children.text: The term “cargo” includes a loaded or empty container on a vessel.

children.heading: .—Transportation in the waterborne commerce of the united states
children.label: 3 .—Transportation in the waterborne commerce of the united states
children.text: The term “transportation in the waterborne commerce of the United States” includes the operation of a vessel in the fisheries, except only for sport fishing.

children.label: A
children.text: any part of a loss excluded from marine insurance coverage under a “free of capture or seizure” clause or analogous clause; and

children.label: B
children.text: any other loss from a hostile act, including confiscation, expropriation, nationalization, or deprivation.
